name: HWR_PER_PRFL_SYNC
description: The configuration table stores information about Social Network User required for IConnector queries for applications used in HWR project.

columns.Name: PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the ID of the profile for which profile sync info is stored.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This represents the data source.

columns.Name: AUTH_TOKEN
columns.Comments: This is the authentication token for the profile.

columns.Name: REFRESH_TOKEN
columns.Comments: This is the refresh token for the profile.

columns.Name: TOKEN_TYPE
columns.Comments: This is the token type for the profile.

columns.Name: AUTH_SECRET
columns.Comments: This is the authentication secret for the profile.

columns.Name: AUTH_EXPIRATION_DATE
columns.Comments: This is authentication expiration date.

columns.Name: STATE_DATA
columns.Comments: This identifies the state of profile synchronization.

columns.Name: META_DATA
columns.Comments: This is additional metadata that may be used for the connector.

columns.Name: STATE
columns.Comments: This is an enumeration describing registered or unregistered state.

columns.Name: LAST_DWNLD_DT_PRFL_CORE
columns.Comments: This is the last download date of the profile core.

columns.Name: LAST_DWNLD_DT_PRFL_RLTNS
columns.Comments: This is the last download date of the profile relations.

columns.Name: LAST_DWNLD_DT_PRFL_POSTS
columns.Comments: This is the last download date of the profile posts.

columns.Name: GBL_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the global profile Id associated with the profile sync.

columns.Name: LINKED_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the ID of the profile with which profile sync info is linked.

columns.Name: LINKED_SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the ID of the source with which profile sync info is linked.

columns.Name: HWR_SHARING_ENABLED
columns.Comments: This indicates whether user has opted in for sharing of HWR updates or not. 0 --> False, 1--> True. Default is False;

columns.Name: HHR_SHARING_ENABLED
columns.Comments: This indicates whether user has opted in for sharing of HHR updates or not. 0 --> False, 1--> True. Default is False;

columns.Name: EHW_SHARING_ENABLED
columns.Comments: This indicates whether user has opted in for sharing of EHW updates or not. 0 --> False, 1--> True. Default is False;

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
